repositories.name: ao-mission
repositories.role: operator-facing mission state and continuation lifecycle
repositories.source_of_truth: mission ledger, routing state, checkpoints, and final-response gates

repositories.name: ao-blueprint
repositories.source_of_truth: operator-approved requirements, canonical prompt bytes, and authorization scope

repositories.name: ao-atlas
repositories.role: workgraph compilation, context packs, readbacks, and continuation prompts
repositories.source_of_truth: workgraph, recommendation wave, readback, and evidence indexes

repositories.name: ao-foundry
repositories.role: bounded implementation import, run-link evidence, and safe-next-work readiness
repositories.source_of_truth: Foundry imports, run links, readiness rollups, and node closure evidence

repositories.name: ao-forge
repositories.role: GoalRun orchestration and per-run scheduling fixtures
repositories.source_of_truth: GoalRun records, replay packets, and dry-run orchestration evidence

repositories.name: ao-covenant
repositories.role: policy kernel, schema registry, approval tickets, and trust verification
repositories.source_of_truth: policy evaluations, ticket schemas, contract registry, and approval evidence

repositories.name: ao2
repositories.role: execution runtime, provider adapters, sandboxing, and approval application
repositories.source_of_truth: runtime options, provider provenance, approvals, diffs, and rollback receipts

repositories.name: ao2-control-plane
repositories.role: observer service, durable event storage, and evidence service
repositories.source_of_truth: control-plane event indexes, migrations, telemetry, and state recovery evidence

repositories.name: ao-command
repositories.role: operator readback and compact status presentation
repositories.source_of_truth: Mission and control-plane client readbacks without duplicating domain truth

repositories.name: ao-arena
repositories.source_of_truth: paired benchmark tasks, repeated run results, and score evidence

repositories.name: ao-crucible
repositories.source_of_truth: failure-injection fixtures, adversarial probes, and replayable attack evidence

repositories.name: ao-sentinel
repositories.role: public-safety, CI, runtime, policy, and evidence freshness scanning
repositories.source_of_truth: native Sentinel verdicts and scoped public-safety scan evidence

repositories.name: ao-promoter
repositories.source_of_truth: signed assurance inputs, no-activation verdicts, and promotion rollups

repositories.name: ao-architecture
repositories.role: generated architecture status, ADRs, compatibility tables, and roadmap inventory
repositories.source_of_truth: generated status, ADRs, and links to current evidence catalogs

authority_boundaries.boundary: Mission owns durable state and final-response gates.
authority_boundaries.constraint: Atlas readbacks cannot silently close the parent mission without Mission reconciliation.

authority_boundaries.boundary: Blueprint owns requirements and new authorization.
authority_boundaries.constraint: Atlas may continue ready governed work but must route new scope through Blueprint.

authority_boundaries.boundary: Atlas owns workgraph and context compilation.
authority_boundaries.constraint: Atlas must not execute provider work or claim authority promotion from planning evidence.

authority_boundaries.boundary: Foundry owns bounded implementation imports and run-link closure.
authority_boundaries.constraint: Foundry evidence is node evidence, not mission completion by itself.

authority_boundaries.boundary: Covenant owns policy and schema authority.
authority_boundaries.constraint: Command or Atlas fixtures cannot override Covenant rejection or approval semantics.

authority_boundaries.boundary: AO2 owns runtime execution and approval application.
authority_boundaries.constraint: Month 5 preparation must stop before provider execution or mutation application.

authority_boundaries.boundary: Control plane owns observed event storage and evidence service state.
authority_boundaries.constraint: Atlas may reference observer evidence but cannot widen credentials or deploy services.
This wave requests no promotion and preserves RSI denial.
